subject: [GLOBAL] Add some conditions before gating CI
commit_message:
[GLOBAL] Add some conditions before gating CI

It is preferable to avoid Gate launch if a linter fails.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Change-Id: If400560d296c5291d14b2c1c1727accc6f6d576c
Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
